title: Incense Stick Holder Censer Ceramic Handmade Artistic Burner Stick Coil Lotus Porcelain Decorative Flower Incense Cone Ash Catcher Tray Handmade
features: Multipurpose:incense burner holder is suitable for sticks, cones incenses.
Unique Lotus flower design:compliment your decor and lotus leaf design catch falling ash as your incense burns away.

description: This is an "interesting" incense burner. It has a variety of combination way and it almost apply to all types of incense: joss-stick, taper incense, pancake incense The whole process is the pure handmade porcelain method. Unique beauty: the luster & color of Corcio censer may have change as time goes on. You will see the unique beautiful halo & colors Important tips: Always use caution -- burning incense is hot stuff. It seems obvious, but it can never "hurt" to mention it. Always place your burner on a heat-resistant surface.
